title: Custody Account
description:
An account used for keeping investments in assets like shares, bonds, savings certificates and funds safe and managing them.


A financial account (such as a bank account, a trust fund or a brokerage account) set up for the benefit of a beneficiary, and administered by a responsible person, known as a legal guardian or custodian, who has a fiduciary obligation to the beneficiary. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Custodial_account
